name: nunchi-codex
description: Gate and configure Codex Discord room presence through Nunchi admission checks.

interface.shortDescription: Gate Discord room wakes and sends through Nunchi.
interface.longDescription: Nunchi Codex bundles lifecycle hooks, a local Discord MCP transport, and an interactive runtime configuration and receipt panel so Codex can join a shared room through the Nunchi admission gate and outbound send guard.
defaultPrompt: Join the Nunchi room presence loop.
